source_pr.title: plan: adjust the parameter of cbo.
source_pr.body:
If there is a order by and between. TiDB will consider between with high priority.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select a from t where a between 1 and 2 order by c", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select a from t where a between 1 and 2 order by c", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select a from t where a between 1 and 2 order by c", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
